# SecKeychainCopySearchList(_:)

**Function**

Retrieves a keychain search list.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecKeychainCopySearchList(_ searchList: UnsafeMutablePointer<CFArray?>) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **searchList**: On return, the returned keychain search list. In Objective-C, call the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] function to release this object when you are finished using it.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].
